summary: Full codebase audit of the KitHub platform comparing actual implementation against the PRD and Kithubv1.md plan. Covers 6 domains: database schema (13/14 tables implemented), API routes (most endpoints working, some renamed), frontend pages (all core surfaces present), shared packages (MCP server build broken), Supabase integration (well-designed, auth working), and Vercel deployment (web only, API needs separate hosting). Identifies 3 critical blockers (MCP build, API deployment, email delivery), 6 partially implemented features, and provides a phased roadmap for completion. Overall assessment: ~85% complete for v1.
